rules.explanation_for_clinician: Naltrexone is an opioid antagonist: confirm an adequate opioid-free interval before starting to avoid precipitated withdrawal; it is not for actively opioid-dependent patients without prior detoxification.
missing_investigations: Confirm opioid-free interval / withdrawal status (and follow local naloxone-challenge protocol) before initiation.
